prompt: Ultra-luxury fashion editorial portrait of a glamorous woman inspired by Ana de Armas, displayed in a sophisticated triple-panel composition inside an elegant gold frame. Scene set in a bright Parisian apartment with tall white paneled walls, natural daylight, herringbone wooden floor, and refined French interior architecture. The woman wears a fitted black mini cocktail dress with thin straps, sheer black stockings, long black opera gloves, glossy black stilettos, layered pearl necklace, and gold bracelets. Three cinematic poses across vertical split panels: seated elegantly on a vintage green velvet chair, standing confidently against the wall, and walking gracefully while looking back. High-fashion Vogue aesthetic, timeless femininity, soft luxury mood, clean composition, realistic skin texture, cinematic lighting, subtle shadows, premium editorial photography, Leica medium format look, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, luxury campaign style.
